strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Strong backend development with Nest.js (implied by Node.js + enterprise tooling focus)
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure and scalable systems (re:cinq role)
concerns: Lack of explicit experience with Vitest (testing framework mentioned in job description)
Limited mention of cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure) in recent roles
No direct evidence of Nest.js or Java/Kotlin use in provided roles
response.justification: The candidate shows strong full-stack TypeScript/Node.js experience with React and backend development, including recent work in AI-agent infrastructure (re:cinq role). However, the résumé lacks explicit evidence of Vitest (a required testing framework), Nest.js (implied by Node.js but not confirmed), or cloud platform mentions. The AI-agent work aligns closely with the job's secondary technology note, but primary stack requirements (Nest.js, Vitest) and cloud experience need verification.
